context.description: Reflective essay page about symbolic worldviews, the attraction and persistence of symbol spaces, and projection in judgments of other reality models. It recommends Jonathan Pageau for his detailed explanation of Christian symbolism and its broader universality.
normalization_notes: Classified as philosophical nonfiction because the page is reflective argumentative prose about symbolism and perception.

rows.text_content: Symbolic worlds have their own gravity and can absorb a traveler who enters them. The text argues that people reject other reality models not because they are false, but because they avoid the contradictions they trigger in their own model.

Jonathan Pageau is recommended as a scholar of symbolism who connects Christian symbolism with the modern world and helps explain the universality and long-term stability of religious and ancient symbolic forms.

content.free_text: book_page nonfiction_philosophy symbolism_and_archetypes work title Bewusstseinsreisen - Version 2; page 85; German philosophical essay on symbolism, symbolic worldviews, projection, and Jonathan Pageau
